title: Muffin's Songkran
description: Add items from popular culture from Thailand to Minecraft. Songkran!
body: ## Items ### Water Gun * 16 Colors. * Can be filled with water bottle. * Can be filled with any kind of potion bottle. * Contain 2 shots of water or potion. ### Thai Garland * Crafted with 6 white tulips and 2 poppy. * Non-functional Item, for decoration. ## Enchantment ### Fluid Capacity * Increase maximum amount of shots for Water Gun Item.
